description: State document, in Arabic script. A petition asking for a rescript, probably directed directly to the caliph, because of the raʾy formula towards the end. The petition seems to be regarding a legal case, in which a deceased person previously convicted is innocent because of two testimonies that are mentioned in the petition . The petition is written in a chancery hand, but also continued on the verso, which makes it atypical for Fatimid-era petitions. Also mentions inheritance on verso. Dating: Unknown. Mentions names such as ʿAbdallāh b. Jaʿfar al-Dhabbāḥ and Aḥmad b. Muḥammad and records testimonies that were given before the court. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך מדינה, בכתב ערבי. עצומה הבקשת כתב פסיקה, כנראה מופנית ישירות לח'ליף. העצומה עוסקת בנראה בהליך משפטי שבו אדם שנפטר שהורשע בעבר הוא חף מפשע. ממשיכה בגב הדף, הופכת אותה לא אופיינית לעצומות מתקופת הפאטמים. מוזכרת גם ירושה. דורש בדיקה.
